docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $960.00 FILED BY GATTI, JENO   AGENT #632 AS TO DEFENDANT SEABOARD METROPOLITAN INC. WESTERN PAVEMENT INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-06-2001 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLAINTIFF JENO GATTI REQUEST TO CONTINUE HEARING DATE TO SEPTEMBER 12, 2001 AT 6:30 P.M. SENT TO THE COMMISSIONER FOR APPROVAL.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING RETURNED TO COURT: RETURN TO SENDER, UNCLAIMED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-06-2001, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO SEP-10-2001 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SEABOARD METROPOLITAN INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GATTI, JENO   AGENT #632 IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SEABOARD METROPOLITAN INC. WESTERN PAVEMENT INC. WESTERN PAVEMENT INC. IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE-NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
